scripts.build: npm run sync:recovery && tsc && vite build
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.android:debug: npm run build && npx cap sync android && (cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug)
scripts.ios:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:build: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && xcodebuild -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator build
